name: Menora Mivtachim Pension
description: Extracts pension fund statements and tax documents from Menora Mivtachim (מנורה מבטחים).
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

tools.name: fetch_pension_statement
tools.description: Fetch the current pension fund balance, contributions, and returns. Returns a structured pension statement.

year.description: Year for the pension statement (e.g. 2025). Defaults to current year.

tools.name: fetch_tax_documents
tools.description: Fetch annual tax documents (pension fund annual statement / Form 106) for a given year.

year.description: Tax year to fetch documents for (e.g. 2025)
